title: bellis perennis var. integrifolia
intro: Bellis perennis var. integrifolia, also known as the common daisy with entire leaves, is a variety of the daisy plant that is widely distributed across Europe and North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bellis perennis var. integrifolia include reducing swelling and pain, promoting tissue repair, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
